faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Maplewood, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Maplewood typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and treatment method chosen. Heat treatments for larger homes may cost more, while targeted chemical treatments for smaller infestations are generally less expensive. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Maplewood residents.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Maplewood homes?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and chemical treatment options for Maplewood properties. Heat treatment involves raising room temperatures to 120-135°F to eliminate bed bugs at all life stages in a single day, while our EPA-approved chemical treatments may require 2-3 visits. Our technician will assess your specific situation and recommend the most effective method for your Maplewood home or business.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatments in Maplewood?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a comprehensive warranty on all bed bug treatments in Maplewood, NJ. If bed bugs return within the warranty period, we'll re-treat your property at no additional cost.
